final:
// // This module implements a 4-bit binary down/up counter. It decrements when 'up' is high and the 'en' input is asserted, and increments when 'up' is low under the same condition. The counter resets to zero when the 'rst' input is high. The counting operation occurs on the falling edge of the clock signal, allowing asynchronous operation.
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input en,
    input up,
    output reg [3:0] count
);always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            count <= 4'b0000;
        end else if (en) begin
            if (up) begin
                count <= count + 1;
            end else begin
                count <= count - 1;
            end
        end
    end

endmodule
